title: Run secret scan and get diffs from both repos

log.context: Run secret scan and get diffs from both repos

Here is a summary of what happened:

**Commands 1 & 2** (`check-secrets.sh --recent 5`): Blocked by sandbox — script execution requires manual approval that the subagent environment cannot provide.
